name: AllPoints Fibre Networks
aka: Giganet, Swish Fibre, Jurassic Fibre, AllPoints Fibre
notes:
AS5482 is the new network from AllPoints Fibre Networks (AFPN).
AS5482 is the ASN which peering relationships shall be established to.

In 2024, we shall be consolidating our existing networks of
AS198440 (ex Giganet), AS208189 (Swish Fibre), AS208687 (Jurassic Fibre) to use AS5482 as their sole upstream peer.
Following completion, only AS5482 will peer with third party ASNs, and the existing ASNs peers will be decomissioned.
